summary: Iteration 154: NLYT QA Recette Lot 3 - Blocs I (Charity Payouts Admin) et K (Notifications). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All pages and forms working correctly. No critical bugs found.

passed_tests.I1_payouts_dashboard_kpis: PASS - Dashboard returns associations with available_balance, pending_balance, IBAN, last_payout info
passed_tests.I2_partial_payout_success: PASS - Payout of 10 EUR (1000c) created successfully, wallet debited atomically, IBAN snapshot saved
passed_tests.I3_payout_exceeds_balance: PASS - Excessive payout correctly rejected with 400 'Solde insuffisant'
passed_tests.I4_payout_without_iban: PASS - Payout to association without IBAN rejected with 400 'Aucun IBAN configuré'
passed_tests.I5_payout_nonexistent_association: PASS - Payout to nonexistent association rejected with 404 'Association introuvable'
passed_tests.I6_payouts_filtered_by_association: PASS - Payout history filtered correctly by association_id
passed_tests.I7_invalid_iban_validation: PASS - Invalid IBAN (too short 'ABC') rejected with 400 'IBAN invalide : longueur incorrecte'
passed_tests.I_SECURITY_non_admin_payout: PASS - Non-admin user (igaal@hotmail.com) correctly rejected with 403
passed_tests.K1_notification_counts: PASS - GET /api/notifications/counts returns decisions, disputes, modifications counts
passed_tests.K3_unread_ids_by_type: PASS - GET /api/notifications/unread-ids/{event_type} returns list of unread reference_ids
passed_tests.K3_invalid_event_type: PASS - Invalid event type correctly rejected with 400
passed_tests.I_payout_requires_positive_amount: PASS - Zero amount rejected with 422 validation error
passed_tests.I_payout_requires_bank_reference: PASS - Empty bank_reference rejected with 422 validation error
passed_tests.I_dashboard_requires_admin: PASS - Dashboard endpoint requires admin role (403 for non-admin)

frontend_tests.I_FRONTEND_admin_payouts_page: PASS - Page loads with KPIs (A REVERSER, EN ATTENTE, TOTAL REVERSE), association cards with masked IBAN, payout buttons disabled for associations without IBAN or balance
frontend_tests.I_FRONTEND2_payout_form: PASS - Form pre-filled with association info, amount validation (max=available_balance), bank reference required, transfer date pre-filled, cancel/submit buttons work
frontend_tests.K_FRONTEND_notification_badge: PASS - Badge visible in navbar next to 'Litiges' showing count (1)

critical_code_review_comments: charity_payout_routes.py: Well-structured with proper validation (IBAN check, balance check, association existence)
charity_associations.py: IBAN validation (_validate_iban) correctly checks length (15-34), country code (2 letters), check digits (2 digits)
notification_routes.py: Clean implementation with proper event_type validation
AdminPayouts.js: Good UX with masked IBAN display, disabled buttons for invalid states, form validation
seed_data_creation: I2 test created payout: 1000c to assoc_croix_rouge with reference TEST_I2_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lot 3 (Blocs I, K) tested successfully. All charity payout admin features working: dashboard KPIs, payout creation with validation, IBAN validation, security (admin-only). Notifications API working: counts, mark-read, unread-ids. Frontend payouts page and form working correctly with proper validation. Croix-Rouge current balance: 900c (9.00 EUR) after test payouts.

mocked_apis.stripe: Stripe in test mode (not used for charity payouts - manual bank transfers)
mocked_apis.notifications: Real notifications system (may have 0 notifications if none created)
